newsitems.title: Thank You — Plus What's Coming to the Demo
newsitems.author: tektonicinteractive
newsitems.contents: Thank you all so much for checking out the Inferno Protocol demo during Steam Next Fest! 🙏 Seeing this many of you trapped in the maze together has been an incredibly emotional moment for our small team. We genuinely can't thank you enough. What's coming to the demo We'll be bringing more content from the full game into the demo, including: A quest board Improved Prologue based your feedbacks Trader NPCs New interiors in the maze A brand-new creatureA New Melee Items Fixes We've also fixed most of the issues you reported during Next Fest — thank you for all the feedback and bug reports. It helps us more than you know. If you're enjoying your time in the maze, wishlisting Inferno Protocol means the world to a team our size. ❤️ See you in the maze. — Tektonic Interactive

newsitems.title: The Maze is Open — Inferno Protocol Demo is Live
newsitems.author: tektonicinteractive
newsitems.contents: The Maze is Open. The Demo is Live.You've seen the teaser. You've read the warnings. Now, the door is finally open — and what lies beyond it is yours to face.The Inferno Protocol Demo is now available on Steam. Step into the Prologue, find your footing in the maze, and learn — quickly — that nothing here stays the same for long.What awaits you in the Demo:The Prologue — a self-contained descent that sets the tone for everything to come6-player co-op — the maze is survivable, but not aloneSyringe-based survival mechanics — craft, adapt, endureA shifting multiversal maze that rewards memory over instinct"Memory is your map, and marks are your guide. In a world that seeks to disorient you, your teammates are the only things you can truly count on."The Demo is part of Steam Next Fest — which means for a limited window, the maze is open to all. Don't wait for the walls to shift again.Play the Demo. Wishlist the game. And if you make it out — tell us how far you got.

newsitems.title: The Maze Awaits: Demo and Prologue Coming Very Soon!
newsitems.author: tektonicinteractive
newsitems.contents: Greetings Survivors!The wait is almost over. Following the reveal of our official teaser, we’ve seen your excitement and felt the growing dread of the labyrinth. Today, we are thrilled to share some even bigger news: The Inferno Protocol Demo and Prologue are arriving very soon!This isn't just a glimpse—it’s your first true descent into the darkness. You and your team will finally get to experience the shifting corridors, the syringe-based survival mechanics, and the heavy atmosphere of our multi-versal maze firsthand.As you prepare to step into the unknown, never forget the golden rule that will keep you alive: Memory is your map, and marks are your guide. In a world that constantly seeks to disorient you, your intuition and your teammates are the only things you can truly count on.What to expect in the upcoming release:The Prologue: A standalone experience that sets the stage for the horrors to come.6-Player Co-op: Gather your squad and test your coordination under pressure.Atmospheric Survival: Experience the core crafting and exploration mechanics in their rawest form.Stay tuned for the exact drop date. The labyrinth is shifting, and it’s almost time for you to enter.Add Inferno Protocol to your Wishlist now to be the first to know when the Demo goes live! Wishlist Now: Inferno Protocol on Steam Official Website: Tektonic Interactive Discord: https://discord.gg/3EhwzJg9ub-Tektonic Interactive

newsitems.title: 🔥 Inferno Protocol: Official Teaser Trailer Out Now!
newsitems.author: tektonicinteractive
newsitems.contents: Greetings Survivors!The wait is finally over. We are beyond excited to reveal the official teaser for Inferno Protocol, our upcoming 6-player co-op survival horror experience.Step into the darkness and prepare yourself for a challenge where your intuition is your greatest asset. In the shifting silence of our world, remember the golden rule: Memory is your map, and marks are your guide. This teaser gives you a first look at the atmospheric dread and the intense teamwork required to stay alive. 🌌 Join the CommunityAs we head towards our Q1 2026 launch, we want to hear from you! Join our official channels to stay updated on development and find your future squadmates. Official Website: tektonicinteractive.comJoin our Discord: https://discord.gg/3EhwzJg9ub💀 Wishlist Now!If you haven't already, make sure to add Inferno Protocol to your Steam Wishlist. It helps us tremendously and ensures you don't miss any upcoming playtests or release news.Trust nothing but your instincts. - Tektonic Interactive
